findings.description: The table for 11桁 and 10桁 patterns adds the annotation "(ハイフンなし)" which does not appear in the source. The source simply lists "11桁" and "10桁" as pattern labels with examples; the parenthetical clarification is an editorial addition not present in the original.
findings.source_evidence: Source table rows: `"11桁"` / `01234567890` and `"10桁"` / `0123456789` — no "ハイフンなし" text anywhere in source
